reason: The remediation requires editing the GRUB2 bootloader configuration file (/etc/grub.d/01_users) and regenerating the bootloader config. Mistakes can render the system unbootable, which falls under bootloader changes that the policy classifies as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; bootloader misconfiguration; potential unbootable system; loss of access until recovery media used
